name: High-Definition Underwater Camera Documentary
description: Professional cinema underwater footage from submersible/ROV perspective. Natural deep-sea lighting conditions, particle backscatter, equipment visible in frame, cinematic composition.

visual_attributes.lighting: Natural underwater, submersible light sources, depth-dependent color shift
visual_attributes.texture: Water particles, backscatter, fine sediment, realistic depth cues
visual_attributes.camera_feel: Stable submersible POV, cinematic framing, deliberate composition

image_gen_workflow.prompt_template: [subject/location] underwater filmed from submersible, cinematic deep-sea documentary footage, professional underwater camera, natural lighting with depth, water particles and backscatter, realistic underwater cinematography, submersible POV

video_gen_workflow.motion_prompt_template: slow, deliberate submersible camera movement, cinematic underwater exploration, natural backscatter and particles, immersive deep-sea footage, steady professional cinematography

remotion_role: Minimal - this style is for immersive background footage only
